# GoTG — High-Level Telegram MTProto Framework for Go

> GoTG (Go Telegram) is a production-ready framework for building Telegram bots and userbots in Go, built on gotd/td. It wraps the raw MTProto API with an intuitive high-level interface: 19 handler types, fluent keyboard builders, a conversation state machine, i18n, structured logging, and full raw API access.

Package: `github.com/pageton/gotg`
Go: 1.21+
License: GPL-3.0
Version: v1.0.0-beta23

---

## Installation

```bash
go get github.com/pageton/gotg
```

Required imports for most programs:

```go
import (
    "github.com/pageton/gotg"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/adapter"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/dispatcher/handlers"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/dispatcher/handlers/filters"
)
```

---

## Client Initialization

### NewClient

```go
func gotg.NewClient(apiID int, apiHash string, clientType clientType, opts *gotg.ClientOpts) (*gotg.Client, error)
```

Creates, connects, and authenticates a Telegram client. Blocks until auth is complete.

### Client Types

```go
gotg.AsBot(botToken string) clientType          // Bot account
gotg.AsUser(phoneNumber string) clientType      // User account (phone auth)
gotg.ClientTypePhone(phoneNumber string) clientType // Alias for AsUser
gotg.ClientTypeBot(botToken string) clientType  // Alias for AsBot
gotg.Simple() clientType                        // For string session import (no phone/token needed)
```

### Bot Example

```go
client, err := gotg.NewClient(
    123456,
    "YOUR_API_HASH",
    gotg.AsBot("YOUR_BOT_TOKEN"),
    &gotg.ClientOpts{
        InMemory: true,
    },
)
if err != nil {
    log.Fatalln("failed to start:", err)
}

dp := client.Dispatcher

dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnCommand("start", func(u *adapter.Update) error {
    _, err := u.Reply("Hello!")
    return err
}, filters.Private))

dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnMessage(func(u *adapter.Update) error {
    _, err := u.Reply(u.Text())
    return err
}, filters.Message.Text))

client.Idle()
```

### Userbot Example

```go
client, err := gotg.NewClient(
    123456,
    "YOUR_API_HASH",
    gotg.AsUser("+1234567890"),
    &gotg.ClientOpts{
        Session: session.SqlSession(sqlite.Open("userbot.db")),
    },
)
```

### ClientOpts (All Fields)

```go
type ClientOpts struct {
    // Session
    Session                session.SessionConstructor // Session storage backend
    InMemory               bool                       // In-memory session (non-persistent)

    // Update Handling
    AutoFetchReply         bool   // Auto-fetch replied-to messages
    FetchEntireReplyChain  bool   // Fetch full reply chain
    SendOutgoing           bool   // Enable synthetic outgoing updates (send/edit/delete tracking)
    MaxConcurrentUpdates   int    // Goroutine limit for update processing (default 1000)
    NoUpdates              bool   // Disable update processing entirely
    ParseMode              string // Default parse mode: "HTML", "Markdown", "MarkdownV2", or ""

    // Logging
    LogConfig              *log.Config // Logger config (nil = no logging)

    // Error Handling
    ErrorHandler           dispatcher.ErrorHandler // Custom error handler
    PanicHandler           dispatcher.PanicHandler // Custom panic handler

    // Middleware
    DispatcherMiddlewares  []dispatcher.Handler    // Middleware handlers (run before user handlers)
    Middlewares            []telegram.Middleware    // gotd/td level middlewares
    RunMiddleware          func(origRun, ctx, f)   // Wrap the Run() call (e.g., floodwaiter)

    // Auth
    NoAutoAuth             bool                    // Disable automatic auth on invalid session
    AuthConversator        AuthConversator         // Custom auth UI (default: BasicConversator)
    SendCodeOptions        *auth.SendCodeOptions   // Override auth.SendCode behavior

    // Localization
    SystemLangCode         string // OS language code (ISO 639-1)
    ClientLangCode         string // Client language code (ISO 639-1)

    // Network
    DC                     int          // DC ID to connect (default 2)
    DCList                 dcs.List     // Custom DC list
    Resolver               dcs.Resolver // Custom resolver
    PublicKeys             []telegram.PublicKey
    Device                 *telegram.DeviceConfig

    // Timeouts
    MigrationTimeout       time.Duration
    DialTimeout            time.Duration
    ExchangeTimeout        time.Duration

    // MTProto
    AckBatchSize           int
    AckInterval            time.Duration
    RetryInterval          time.Duration
    MaxRetries             int
    CompressThreshold      int

    // Peers
    PeersFromDialogs       bool // Fetch peers from dialogs on startup (user only)
    WaitOnPeersFromDialogs bool // Block startup until dialog peers are fetched

    // Context
    Context                context.Context // Custom context (default: context.Background())
    DisableCopyright       bool            // Suppress copyright banner
}
```

---

## Client Struct & Methods

```go
type Client struct {
    Dispatcher  dispatcher.Dispatcher
    ConvManager *conv.Manager
    PeerStorage *storage.PeerStorage
    Self        *tg.User
    Logger      *log.Logger
    // ... (network fields)
}
```

### Client Methods

```go
client.Idle() error                           // Block until client stops
client.Stop()                                 // Stop client gracefully
client.Start(opts *ClientOpts) error          // Restart after Stop
client.CreateContext() *adapter.Context        // Create pseudo-update context for sending outside handlers
client.ExportStringSession() (string, error)  // Export session as base64 string
client.RefreshContext(ctx *adapter.Context)    // Refresh context after Stop+Start
```

---

## Session Management

```go
import "github.com/pageton/gotg/session"
import "github.com/glebarez/sqlite"
```

### SQLite (Persistent)

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    Session: session.SqlSession(sqlite.Open("bot.db")),
}
```

### In-Memory (Temporary)

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    InMemory: true,
}
```

### Simple Session (In-Memory with SQLite peer cache)

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    Session: session.SimpleSession(),
}
```

### String Session Import

All string session constructors return a builder with a `.Name(string)` method for
naming the SQLite peer-storage file (e.g. `"my_session"` → `my_session.session`).

```go
// Pyrogram format
session.PyrogramSession("SESSION_STRING").Name("my_session")

// Telethon format
session.TelethonSession("SESSION_STRING").Name("my_session")

// Gramjs format
session.GramjsSession("SESSION_STRING").Name("my_session")

// GoTG native format (exported via client.ExportStringSession())
session.StringSession("SESSION_STRING").Name("my_session")
```

### Telegram Desktop (TData) Session

```go
import "github.com/gotd/td/session/tdesktop"

accounts, _ := tdesktop.Read("/path/to/TelegramDesktop", nil)
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    Session: session.TdataSession(accounts[0]).Name("tdata"),
}
```

### JSON File Session

```go
session.JsonFileSession("/path/to/session.json").Name("json_sess")
```

### Custom Storage Adapter

Implement `storage.Adapter` interface and pass it:

```go
session.WithAdapter(myCustomAdapter)
```

The `storage.Adapter` interface requires:

```go
type Adapter interface {
    GetSession(version int) (*Session, error)
    UpdateSession(s *Session) error
    SavePeer(p *Peer) error
    GetPeerByID(id int64) (*Peer, error)
    GetPeerByUsername(username string) (*Peer, error)
    SaveConvState(state *ConvState) error
    LoadConvState(key string) (*ConvState, error)
    DeleteConvState(key string) error
    ListConvStates() ([]ConvState, error)
    AutoMigrate() error
    Close() error
}
```

Built-in adapters: SQLite (via GORM), PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, raw SQL (sqlc).

---

## Handlers

All handler callbacks use `UpdateHandler`:

```go
type UpdateHandler func(*adapter.Update) error
```

### Handler Registration

```go
dp := client.Dispatcher

dp.AddHandler(handler)                    // Auto-assigned group (incremental)
dp.AddHandlerToGroup(handler, group)      // Specific group (lower = first)
dp.AddHandlers(h1, h2, h3)               // Multiple handlers
dp.AddHandlersToGroup(group, h1, h2)     // Multiple to same group
```

### Custom Handler Interface

```go
type Handler interface {
    CheckUpdate(*adapter.Context, *adapter.Update) error
}
```

### Lower-Level Handler Constructors

The `On*` functions use `UpdateHandler` (takes only `*adapter.Update`). For access to
both `*adapter.Context` and `*adapter.Update`, use the lower-level constructors:

```go
type CallbackResponse func(ctx *adapter.Context, update *adapter.Update) error

// Example:
handlers.NewMessage(filters.Message.Text, func(ctx *adapter.Context, u *adapter.Update) error {
    // ctx gives access to raw client, peer storage, etc.
    _, err := ctx.SendMessage(u.ChatID(), &tg.MessagesSendMessageRequest{
        Message: u.Text(),
    })
    return err
})

// Convert UpdateHandler → CallbackResponse:
handlers.ToCallbackResponse(func(u *adapter.Update) error { ... })
```

### Handler Flow Control

Return these from handlers to control dispatch:

```go
dispatcher.EndGroups        // Stop processing further groups
dispatcher.ContinueGroups   // Continue to next group
dispatcher.SkipCurrentGroup // Skip remaining handlers in current group
dispatcher.StopClient       // Disconnect the client
```

### 19 Handler Constructors

#### Messages

```go
handlers.OnMessage(handler UpdateHandler, messageFilters ...filters.MessageFilter) Message
handlers.OnEditedMessage(handler UpdateHandler, messageFilters ...filters.MessageFilter) EditedMessage
handlers.OnDeletedMessage(handler UpdateHandler, deletedFilters ...filters.DeletedMessageFilter) DeletedMessage
```

#### Commands

```go
handlers.OnCommand(name string, handler UpdateHandler, updateFilters ...filters.UpdateFilter) Command
```

Command matches `/name` or `!name` (configurable via `handlers.DefaultPrefix`). Case-insensitive. Supports `@botname` suffix in groups.

#### Callbacks & Inline

```go
handlers.OnCallbackQuery(filter filters.CallbackQueryFilter, handler UpdateHandler, updateFilters ...filters.UpdateFilter) CallbackQuery
handlers.OnInlineQuery(handler UpdateHandler, inlineFilters ...filters.InlineQueryFilter) InlineQuery
handlers.OnChosenInlineResult(handler UpdateHandler, resultFilters ...filters.ChosenInlineResultFilter) ChosenInlineResult
```

Note: `OnCallbackQuery` handles both regular and inline message callbacks (`tg.UpdateBotCallbackQuery` and `tg.UpdateInlineBotCallbackQuery`).

#### Chat Events

```go
handlers.OnChatMemberUpdated(handler UpdateHandler, chatMemberFilters ...filters.ChatMemberUpdatedFilter) ChatMemberUpdated
handlers.OnParticipant(handler UpdateHandler, ...) ChatMemberUpdated  // Alias
handlers.OnChatJoinRequest(handler UpdateHandler, requestFilters ...filters.PendingJoinRequestsFilter) PendingJoinRequests
```

#### Reactions & Engagement

```go
handlers.OnMessageReaction(handler UpdateHandler, reactionFilters ...filters.MessageReactionFilter) MessageReaction
handlers.OnChatBoost(handler UpdateHandler, boostFilters ...filters.ChatBoostFilter) ChatBoost
```

#### Business API (5 handlers)

```go
handlers.OnBusinessMessage(handler UpdateHandler, messageFilters ...filters.MessageFilter) BusinessMessage
handlers.OnBusinessEditedMessage(handler UpdateHandler, messageFilters ...filters.MessageFilter) BusinessEditedMessage
handlers.OnBusinessDeletedMessage(handler UpdateHandler, f ...filters.BusinessDeletedMessageFilter) BusinessDeletedMessage
handlers.OnBusinessConnection(handler UpdateHandler, f ...filters.BusinessConnectionFilter) BusinessConnection
handlers.OnBusinessCallbackQuery(handler UpdateHandler, f ...filters.BusinessCallbackQueryFilter) BusinessCallbackQuery
```

#### Outgoing Tracking

```go
handlers.OnOutgoing(handler UpdateHandler, messageFilters ...filters.MessageFilter) OutgoingMessage
```

Requires `SendOutgoing: true` in ClientOpts.

#### Catch-All

```go
handlers.OnUpdate(handler UpdateHandler) AnyUpdate
```

---

## Filters

```go
import "github.com/pageton/gotg/dispatcher/handlers/filters"
```

### Filter Types

```go
type UpdateFilter func(u *adapter.Update) bool
type MessageFilter func(m *types.Message) bool
type CallbackQueryFilter func(cbq *tg.UpdateBotCallbackQuery) bool
type InlineQueryFilter func(iq *tg.UpdateBotInlineQuery) bool
type ChosenInlineResultFilter func(cir *tg.UpdateBotInlineSend) bool
type PendingJoinRequestsFilter func(cjr *tg.UpdatePendingJoinRequests) bool
type ChatMemberUpdatedFilter func(u *adapter.Update) bool
type DeletedMessageFilter func(u *adapter.Update) bool
type MessageReactionFilter func(mr *tg.UpdateBotMessageReaction) bool
type ChatBoostFilter func(cb *tg.UpdateBotChatBoost) bool
type BusinessConnectionFilter func(bc *tg.UpdateBotBusinessConnect) bool
type BusinessDeletedMessageFilter func(bd *tg.UpdateBotDeleteBusinessMessage) bool
type BusinessCallbackQueryFilter func(bq *tg.UpdateBusinessBotCallbackQuery) bool
```

### Logical Operators

```go
filters.And(f1, f2 ...UpdateFilter) UpdateFilter
filters.Or(f1, f2 ...UpdateFilter) UpdateFilter
filters.Not(f UpdateFilter) UpdateFilter

filters.MessageAnd(f1, f2 ...MessageFilter) MessageFilter
filters.MessageOr(f1, f2 ...MessageFilter) MessageFilter
filters.MessageNot(f MessageFilter) MessageFilter
```

### Global Update Filters

```go
filters.Private    // Private chat (PeerUser)
filters.Group      // Group or supergroup
filters.Channel    // Channel (non-supergroup)
filters.Supergroup // Supergroup
filters.Incoming   // Incoming message
filters.Outgoing   // Outgoing message
filters.Business   // Business update
```

### Message Filters (filters.Message.*)

Text matching:
```go
filters.Message.Text                          // Has text (no media)
filters.Message.Equal(text string)            // Exact match
filters.Message.Prefix(prefix string)         // Starts with
filters.Message.Suffix(suffix string)         // Ends with
filters.Message.Contains(substring string)    // Contains
filters.Message.Regex(pattern string)         // Regex match
filters.Message.MinLength(n int)              // Text length >= n
filters.Message.MaxLength(n int)              // Text length <= n
```

Media types:
```go
filters.Message.Media       // Any media
filters.Message.Photo       // Photo
filters.Message.Video       // Video
filters.Message.Animation   // GIF/animation
filters.Message.Sticker     // Sticker
filters.Message.Audio       // Audio file
filters.Message.Voice       // Voice note
filters.Message.VideoNote   // Video note (round video)
filters.Message.Document    // Generic document
filters.Message.Contact     // Contact card
filters.Message.Location    // Location
filters.Message.LiveLocation // Live location
filters.Message.Venue       // Venue
filters.Message.WebPage     // Webpage preview
filters.Message.Game        // Game
filters.Message.Poll        // Poll
filters.Message.Dice        // Dice
filters.Message.DocumentFilename(pattern string) // Document filename regex
```

Message properties:
```go
filters.Message.Edited          // Was edited
filters.Message.Reply           // Is a reply
filters.Message.Forwarded       // Was forwarded
filters.Message.Caption         // Has caption
filters.Message.MediaGroup      // Part of album
filters.Message.Scheduled       // Scheduled message
filters.Message.ViaBot          // Sent via inline bot
filters.Message.HasMediaSpoiler // Has media spoiler
filters.Message.Pinned          // Is pinned
filters.Message.InlineKeyboard  // Has inline keyboard
filters.Message.ReplyKeyboard   // Has reply keyboard
```

Chat/sender:
```go
filters.Message.Private         // Private chat
filters.Message.Group           // Group
filters.Message.Channel         // Channel
filters.Message.Chat(chatID int64) // From specific chat
filters.Message.ChatType(t ChatType) // By chat type
filters.Message.Me              // Sent by self
filters.Message.Bot             // Sent by bot
filters.Message.Incoming        // Incoming
filters.Message.Outgoing        // Outgoing
```

Entities:
```go
filters.Message.Mention         // @mention
filters.Message.Hashtag         // #hashtag
filters.Message.Cashtag         // $cashtag
filters.Message.BotCommand      // /command
filters.Message.Url             // URL
filters.Message.Email           // Email
filters.Message.PhoneNumber     // Phone number
filters.Message.Bold            // Bold text
filters.Message.Italic          // Italic text
filters.Message.Code            // Inline code
filters.Message.Pre             // Pre-formatted
filters.Message.Spoiler         // Spoiler
filters.Message.Blockquote      // Blockquote
filters.Message.CustomEmoji     // Custom emoji
```

Service messages:
```go
filters.Message.Service              // Any service message
filters.Message.NewChatMembers       // Members added
filters.Message.LeftChatMember       // Member left
filters.Message.NewChatTitle         // Title changed
filters.Message.NewChatPhoto         // Photo changed
filters.Message.PinnedMessage        // Message pinned
filters.Message.VideoChatStarted     // Video chat started
filters.Message.VideoChatEnded       // Video chat ended
filters.Message.Giveaway             // Giveaway launched
filters.Message.GiveawayWinners      // Winners announced
filters.Message.Gift                 // Premium gift
// ... and more service message filters
```

### Callback Query Filters (filters.CallbackQuery.*)

```go
filters.CallbackQuery.All                        // Match all
filters.CallbackQuery.Prefix(prefix string)       // Data starts with
filters.CallbackQuery.Suffix(suffix string)        // Data ends with
filters.CallbackQuery.Equal(data string)           // Data equals
filters.CallbackQuery.Contains(substring string)   // Data contains
filters.CallbackQuery.Regex(pattern string)        // Data regex match
filters.CallbackQuery.FromUserID(userID int64)     // From specific user
filters.CallbackQuery.GameName(name string)        // Game name match
```

### Inline Query Filters (filters.InlineQuery.*)

```go
filters.InlineQuery.All                          // Match all
filters.InlineQuery.Prefix(prefix string)         // Query starts with
filters.InlineQuery.Suffix(suffix string)          // Query ends with
filters.InlineQuery.Equal(data string)             // Query equals
filters.InlineQuery.FromUserID(userID int64)       // From specific user
```

### Deleted Message Filters (filters.DeletedMessage.*)

```go
filters.DeletedMessage.All
filters.DeletedMessage.ChannelOnly
filters.DeletedMessage.PrivateOnly
filters.DeletedMessage.ChannelID(channelID int64)
```

### Business Filters

```go
filters.BusinessConn.All / .Enabled / .Disabled / .UserID(id) / .ConnectionID(id)
filters.BusinessDeletedMsg.All / .ConnectionID(id)
filters.BusinessCallbackQry.All / .Prefix(s) / .Suffix(s) / .Equal(s) / .Contains(s) / .Regex(s) / .FromUserID(id) / .ConnectionID(id)
```

### Example: Combining Filters

```go
// Message with text in private chat
dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnMessage(handler, filters.Message.Text, filters.Message.Private))

// Multiple message filters are AND'd automatically when passed as variadic args

// Using explicit logical operators
photoOrVideo := filters.MessageOr(filters.Message.Photo, filters.Message.Video)
dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnMessage(handler, photoOrVideo))

// Command in private only
dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnCommand("start", handler, filters.Private))

// Callback with data prefix
dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnCallbackQuery(filters.CallbackQuery.Prefix("btn_"), handler))
```

---

## The Update Object

Every handler receives `*adapter.Update`. This is the primary object for interacting with incoming updates.

### Update Fields

```go
type Update struct {
    EffectiveMessage        *types.Message
    CallbackQuery           *tg.UpdateBotCallbackQuery
    InlineCallbackQuery     *tg.UpdateInlineBotCallbackQuery
    InlineQuery             *types.InlineQuery
    ChosenInlineResult      *types.ChosenInlineResult
    ChatJoinRequest         *tg.UpdatePendingJoinRequests
    ChatParticipant         *tg.UpdateChatParticipant
    ChannelParticipant      *tg.UpdateChannelParticipant
    DeletedMessages         *tg.UpdateDeleteMessages
    DeletedChannelMessages  *tg.UpdateDeleteChannelMessages
    MessageReaction         *tg.UpdateBotMessageReaction
    ChatBoost               *tg.UpdateBotChatBoost
    BusinessConnection      *tg.UpdateBotBusinessConnect
    BusinessMessage         *tg.UpdateBotNewBusinessMessage
    BusinessEditedMessage   *tg.UpdateBotEditBusinessMessage
    BusinessDeletedMessages *tg.UpdateBotDeleteBusinessMessage
    BusinessCallbackQuery   *tg.UpdateBusinessBotCallbackQuery
    EffectiveOutgoing       *FakeOutgoingUpdate
    Log                     *log.Logger
    UpdateClass             tg.UpdateClass
    Entities                *tg.Entities
    Self                    *tg.User
    Ctx                     *Context
    IsEdited                bool
}
```

### Accessor Methods

```go
u.HasMessage() bool              // Has an effective message
u.Text() string                  // Message text (empty if no message)
u.Data() string                  // Callback data as string (works for regular + inline callbacks)
u.Args() []string                // Whitespace-split args (from message text, callback data, or inline query)

u.MsgID() int                    // Message ID
u.MessageID() int                // Alias for MsgID
u.ChatID() int64                 // Chat ID
u.ChannelID() int64              // Channel ID
u.UserID() int64                 // User ID

u.FirstName() string
u.LastName() string
u.FullName() string              // FirstName + " " + LastName
u.Username() string
u.Usernames() []tg.Username      // All usernames including collected
u.LangCode() string              // User's language code

u.EffectiveUser() *types.User
u.EffectiveChat() types.EffectiveChat
u.EffectiveReply() *types.Message // The replied-to message (lazy-fetched)
u.GetChat() *types.Chat
u.GetChannel() *types.Channel
u.GetUserChat() *types.User

u.IsBot() bool                   // Current session is bot
u.IsReply() bool                 // Message is a reply
u.IsOutgoing() bool              // Sent by self
u.IsIncoming() bool              // Sent by other
u.IsBusinessUpdate() bool        // Business API update
u.ConnectionID() string          // Business connection ID
u.ChatType() string              // "private", "group", "channel", or ""
```

---

## Sending Messages (Update Bound Methods)

### Reply (auto-replies to current message)

```go
u.Reply(text any, opts ...*adapter.SendOpts) (*types.Message, error)
u.ReplyMedia(media tg.InputMediaClass, opts ...*adapter.SendMediaOpts) (*types.Message, error)
u.ReplyMediaWithFileID(fileID string, opts ...*adapter.SendMediaOpts) (*types.Message, error)
```

`Reply` automatically sets `ReplyTo` to the current message. Uses default parse mode.

### SendMessage (does NOT auto-reply)

```go
u.SendMessage(chatID int64, text string, opts ...*adapter.SendOpts) (*types.Message, error)
```

Pass `chatID=0` to use current chat. Does NOT reply by default — set `ReplyMessageID` in opts to reply.

### SendMedia (does NOT auto-reply)

```go
u.SendMedia(media tg.InputMediaClass, caption string, opts ...*adapter.SendMediaOpts) (*types.Message, error)
u.SendMultiMedia(media []tg.InputMediaClass, opts ...*adapter.SendMediaOpts) (*types.Message, error)
```

### SendOpts

```go
type SendOpts struct {
    ParseMode              string               // "HTML", "Markdown", "MarkdownV2"
    ReplyMarkup            tg.ReplyMarkupClass   // Inline or reply keyboard
    ReplyMessageID         int                   // Reply to specific message
    WithoutReply           bool                  // Don't reply even in Reply() method
    Entities               []tg.MessageEntityClass
    NoWebpage              bool
    Silent                 bool
    Background             bool
    ClearDraft             bool
    Noforwards             bool
    ScheduleDate           int
    Effect                 int64
    SendAs                 tg.InputPeerClass
    BusinessConnectionID   string
    // ... and more
}
```

### SendMediaOpts

```go
type SendMediaOpts struct {
    Caption                string
    ParseMode              string
    ReplyMarkup            tg.ReplyMarkupClass
    ReplyMessageID         int
    WithoutReply           bool
    Entities               []tg.MessageEntityClass
    BusinessConnectionID   string
    // ... same flags as SendOpts
}
```

### Examples

```go
// Simple reply
u.Reply("Hello!")

// Reply with HTML
u.Reply("<b>Bold</b> text", &adapter.SendOpts{ParseMode: "HTML"})

// Reply with inline keyboard
kb := gotg.Keyboard().Button("Click", "data").Build()
u.Reply("Choose:", &adapter.SendOpts{ReplyMarkup: kb})

// Send to specific chat (no reply)
u.SendMessage(chatID, "Hello!")

// Send to current chat without replying
u.SendMessage(0, "Not a reply")

// Reply with media using fileID
u.ReplyMediaWithFileID(fileID, &adapter.SendMediaOpts{Caption: "Here!"})
```

---

## Editing Messages

### Edit Current Message

```go
u.Edit(text any, opts ...*adapter.EditOpts) (*types.Message, error)
u.EditMedia(media tg.InputMediaClass, opts ...*adapter.EditMediaOpts) (*types.Message, error)
u.EditMediaWithFileID(fileID string, opts ...*adapter.EditMediaOpts) (*types.Message, error)
u.EditCaption(text any, opts ...*adapter.EditOpts) (*types.Message, error)
u.EditReplyMarkup(markup tg.ReplyMarkupClass) (*types.Message, error)
```

For callback queries, these edit the message that triggered the callback. For inline callbacks, they automatically use the inline message edit path.

### Edit Specific Message

```go
u.EditMessage(chatID int64, messageID int, text string, opts ...*adapter.EditOpts) (*types.Message, error)
u.EditMessageMedia(chatID int64, messageID int, media tg.InputMediaClass, caption string, opts ...*adapter.EditMediaOpts) (*types.Message, error)
```

### Edit Inline Messages

```go
u.EditInlineText(text any, opts ...*adapter.EditOpts) error
u.EditInlineCaption(caption any, opts ...*adapter.EditOpts) error
u.EditInlineMedia(media tg.InputMediaClass, opts ...*adapter.EditMediaOpts) error
u.EditInlineReplyMarkup(markup tg.ReplyMarkupClass) error
```

### EditOpts

```go
type EditOpts struct {
    ParseMode            string
    ReplyMarkup          tg.ReplyMarkupClass
    Media                tg.InputMediaClass
    Entities             []tg.MessageEntityClass
    NoWebpage            bool
    BusinessConnectionID string
    // ...
}
```

---

## Callback Queries

### Answer

```go
u.Answer(text string, opts ...*adapter.CallbackOptions) (bool, error)
```

Works for both regular and inline message callbacks.

```go
type CallbackOptions struct {
    Alert     bool   // Show as popup alert
    CacheTime int    // Client-side cache time (seconds)
    URL       string // Open URL
}
```

### Examples

```go
dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnCallbackQuery(filters.CallbackQuery.Prefix("btn_"), func(u *adapter.Update) error {
    data := u.Data() // "btn_confirm"
    u.Answer("Done!")
    u.Edit("Updated text")
    return nil
}))

// Alert popup
u.Answer("Error occurred!", &adapter.CallbackOptions{Alert: true})
```

---

## Inline Queries

```go
u.AnswerInlineQuery(results []tg.InputBotInlineResultClass, opts *types.AnswerOpts) (bool, error)
u.AnswerInlineQueryWithGallery(results []tg.InputBotInlineResultClass, opts *types.AnswerOpts) (bool, error)
```

---

## Other Update Methods

### Delete

```go
u.Delete() error                                      // Delete current message
```

### Pin/Unpin

```go
u.Pin() (tg.UpdatesClass, error)                      // Pin current message
u.UnPin() error                                        // Unpin current message
u.UnPinAll() error                                     // Unpin all in chat
```

### User Info

```go
u.GetUser() (*tg.User, error)                         // Get user info
u.GetFullUser() (*tg.UserFull, error)                  // Get full user profile
u.GetChatInviteLink(req ...) (tg.ExportedChatInviteClass, error)
```

### Mention Helper

```go
u.Mention(args ...any) string  // HTML mention link
// No args: uses current user
// One int64: override userID
// One string: override name
// Two args: (userID, name)
// Returns: <a href='tg://user?id=ID'>NAME</a>
```

### Debug

```go
u.Dump(val any, key ...string) string   // Pretty-print JSON
u.DumpValue() any                        // Raw UpdateClass
```

### i18n

```go
u.T(key string, args ...any) string     // Translate (requires i18n middleware)
u.SetLang(lang any)                      // Set user language
u.GetLang() any                          // Get user language
```

### Format Helper

```go
f := u.Format("HTML") // or "Markdown", "MarkdownV2"
f.Bold("text")
f.Italic("text")
f.Underline("text")
f.Strikethrough("text")
f.Spoiler("text")
f.Code("text")
f.Pre("text")
f.PreWithLanguage("code", "go")
f.Link("text", "https://...")
f.Mention("Name", userID)
f.CustomEmoji("emoji", emojiID)
f.Blockquote("text")
f.ExpandableBlockquote("text")
```

---

## Message Bound Methods (types.Message)

The `u.EffectiveMessage` (and `u.EffectiveReply()`) is a `*types.Message` with bound
methods for direct operations on that message.

### Media Accessors

Each returns a typed wrapper (or nil if not present). Document wrappers have `.FileID()`.

```go
msg := u.EffectiveMessage

msg.Photo() *types.Photo              // Photo media (has .FileID())
msg.Document() *types.Document        // Generic document (has .FileID())
msg.Video() *types.Document           // Video
msg.Audio() *types.Document           // Audio file
msg.Voice() *types.Document           // Voice note
msg.VideoNote() *types.Document       // Round video
msg.Sticker() *types.Document         // Sticker
msg.Animation() *types.Document       // GIF/animation
msg.Geo() *tg.MessageMediaGeo         // Location
msg.GeoLive() *tg.MessageMediaGeoLive // Live location
msg.Contact() *tg.MessageMediaContact // Contact card
msg.Poll() *tg.MessageMediaPoll       // Poll
msg.Venue() *tg.MessageMediaVenue     // Venue
msg.Dice() *tg.MessageMediaDice       // Dice
msg.Game() *tg.MessageMediaGame       // Game
msg.WebPage() *tg.MessageMediaWebPage // Webpage preview
msg.Invoice() *tg.MessageMediaInvoice // Invoice
msg.Story() *tg.MessageMediaStory     // Story
msg.Giveaway() *tg.MessageMediaGiveaway
msg.GiveawayResults() *tg.MessageMediaGiveawayResults
msg.PaidMedia() *tg.MessageMediaPaidMedia

msg.IsMedia() bool                    // Has any media
msg.FileID() string                   // FileID of any photo/document
```

### Download

```go
// Download to file (auto-generates filename if path is "")
path, fileType, err := msg.Download("")
path, fileType, err := msg.Download("downloads/photo.jpg")

// Download to memory
data, fileType, err := msg.DownloadBytes()
```

### Message Operations

```go
msg.Delete() error                                  // Delete this message
msg.GetUser() (*tg.User, error)                     // Get sender user info
msg.GetFullUser() (*tg.UserFull, error)              // Get sender full profile
msg.Link() string                                    // Telegram link (empty for PMs)
msg.IsForward() bool                                 // Was forwarded
msg.IsOutgoing() bool                                // Sent by self
msg.UserID() int64                                   // Sender user ID (0 if not user)
```

### Message Fields

```go
msg.Text string                    // Message text
msg.ReplyToMessage *types.Message  // The reply target (if fetched)
msg.IsService bool                 // Is a service message (join, title change, etc.)
msg.Action tg.MessageActionClass   // Service message action
msg.Message *tg.Message            // Underlying raw tg.Message (all fields)
```

---

## User/Chat/Channel Bound Methods

`u.EffectiveUser()`, `u.GetUserChat()`, `u.GetChat()`, `u.GetChannel()` return typed
objects with bound methods.

### User (types.User)

```go
user := u.EffectiveUser()

user.GetID() int64
user.GetAccessHash() int64
user.IsUser() bool                                   // Always true
user.GetInputPeer() tg.InputPeerClass
user.GetInputUser() tg.InputUserClass
user.Raw() *tg.User                                  // Underlying tg.User

user.SendMessage(text string, opts ...any) (*types.Message, error)
user.SendMedia(media tg.InputMediaClass, opts ...any) (*types.Message, error)
user.Block() error
user.Unblock() error
user.GetChatMemberIn(chatID int64) (any, error)      // Membership info in a chat

user.Mention(args ...any) string
// No args: HTML mention with full name
// int64 arg: override userID
// string arg: override name
// Two args: (userID, name)
```

### Chat (types.Chat)

```go
chat := u.GetChat()

chat.GetID() int64
chat.IsChat() bool                                   // Always true
chat.GetInputPeer() tg.InputPeerClass
chat.Raw() *tg.Chat

chat.GetChat() (tg.ChatClass, error)
chat.GetChatMembers(opts ...*functions.GetChatMembersOpts) ([]*types.Participant, error)
chat.GetChatInviteLink(req ...*tg.MessagesExportChatInviteRequest) (*tg.ExportedChatInviteClass, error)
```

### Channel (types.Channel)

```go
channel := u.GetChannel()

channel.GetID() int64
channel.IsChannel() bool                             // Always true
channel.GetInputPeer() tg.InputPeerClass
channel.GetInputChannel() tg.InputChannelClass
channel.Raw() *tg.Channel
```

### EffectiveChat Interface

All three implement `types.EffectiveChat`:

```go
type EffectiveChat interface {
    GetID() int64
    GetAccessHash() int64
    IsChannel() bool
    IsChat() bool
    IsUser() bool
    GetInputUser() tg.InputUserClass
    GetInputChannel() tg.InputChannelClass
    GetInputPeer() tg.InputPeerClass
}
```

---

## Context (adapter.Context)

The `Context` is accessible via `u.Ctx` and provides lower-level methods.

### Context Fields

```go
type Context struct {
    Raw            *tg.Client           // Raw gotd/td client
    Self           *tg.User             // Current user
    Sender         *message.Sender      // Message sending helper
    Entities       *tg.Entities         // Update entities
    TelegramClient *telegram.Client     // High-level telegram client
    PeerStorage    *storage.PeerStorage // Peer cache
    Conv           *conv.Manager        // Conversation manager
    Logger         *log.Logger
    context.Context                     // Embedded context
}
```

### Context Send Methods

```go
ctx.SendMessage(chatID int64, req *tg.MessagesSendMessageRequest, businessConnectionID ...string) (*types.Message, error)
ctx.SendMedia(chatID int64, req *tg.MessagesSendMediaRequest, businessConnectionID ...string) (*types.Message, error)
ctx.SendMultiMedia(chatID int64, req *tg.MessagesSendMultiMediaRequest, businessConnectionID ...string) (*types.Message, error)
ctx.SendReaction(chatID int64, req *tg.MessagesSendReactionRequest) (*types.Message, error)
```

### Context Edit Methods

```go
ctx.EditMessage(chatID int64, req *tg.MessagesEditMessageRequest, businessConnectionID ...string) (*types.Message, error)
ctx.EditCaption(chatID int64, messageID int, caption string, entities []tg.MessageEntityClass) (*types.Message, error)
ctx.EditReplyMarkup(chatID int64, messageID int, markup tg.ReplyMarkupClass) (*types.Message, error)
```

### Context Chat Methods

```go
ctx.GetChat(chatID int64) (tg.ChatClass, error)
ctx.GetFullChat(chatID int64) (tg.ChatFullClass, error)
ctx.GetUser(userID int64) (*tg.User, error)
ctx.GetFullUser(userID int64) (*tg.UserFull, error)
ctx.GetChatMember(chatID, userID int64) (*types.Participant, error)
ctx.GetChatMembers(chatID int64, opts ...*GetChatMembersOpts) ([]*types.Participant, error)
ctx.GetMessages(chatID int64, messageIDs []tg.InputMessageClass) ([]tg.MessageClass, error)
ctx.GetUserProfilePhotos(userID int64, opts *tg.PhotosGetUserPhotosRequest) ([]tg.PhotoClass, error)
ctx.GetChatInviteLink(chatID int64, req ...*tg.MessagesExportChatInviteRequest) (tg.ExportedChatInviteClass, error)
```

### Context Moderation

```go
ctx.BanChatMember(chatID, userID int64, untilDate int) (tg.UpdatesClass, error)
ctx.UnbanChatMember(chatID, userID int64) (bool, error)
ctx.AddChatMembers(chatID int64, userIDs []int64, forwardLimit int) (bool, error)
ctx.PromoteChatMember(chatID, userID int64, opts *EditAdminOpts) (bool, error)
ctx.DemoteChatMember(chatID, userID int64, opts *EditAdminOpts) (bool, error)
ctx.Leave(chatID int64) (tg.UpdatesClass, error)
ctx.DeleteMessages(chatID int64, messageIDs []int) error
ctx.ForwardMessages(fromChatID, toChatID int64, req *tg.MessagesForwardMessagesRequest) (tg.UpdatesClass, error)
ctx.PinMessage(chatID int64, messageID int) (tg.UpdatesClass, error)
ctx.UnPinMessage(chatID int64, messageID int) error
ctx.UnPinAllMessages(chatID int64) error
```

### Context Chat Creation

```go
ctx.CreateChannel(title, about string, broadcast bool) (*tg.Channel, error)
ctx.CreateChat(title string, userIDs []int64) (*tg.Chat, error)
ctx.ArchiveChats(chatIDs []int64) (bool, error)
ctx.UnarchiveChats(chatIDs []int64) (bool, error)
```

### Context Resolve

```go
ctx.ResolveUsername(username string) (types.EffectiveChat, error)
ctx.ResolveInputPeerByID(id int64) (tg.InputPeerClass, error)
ctx.ResolvePeerByID(id int64) *storage.Peer
```

### Context Download

```go
ctx.DownloadMedia(media tg.MessageMediaClass, output DownloadOutputClass, opts *DownloadMediaOpts) (tg.StorageFileTypeClass, error)

// Download destinations:
adapter.DownloadOutputPath("./file.jpg")           // To file
adapter.DownloadOutputStream{Writer: &buf}          // To io.Writer
adapter.DownloadOutputParallel{WriterAt: file}      // Parallel chunks

// Download options:
type DownloadMediaOpts struct {
    Threads  int   // Parallel download threads
    Verify   *bool // Verify file hash
    PartSize int   // Chunk size in bytes
}
```

### Context Session Export

```go
ctx.ExportSessionString() (string, error)  // Export current session as string
```

### Context Inline

```go
ctx.SetInlineBotResult(req *tg.MessagesSetInlineBotResultsRequest) (bool, error)
ctx.GetInlineBotResults(chatID int64, botUsername string, req *tg.MessagesGetInlineBotResultsRequest) (*tg.MessagesBotResults, error)
ctx.SendInlineBotResult(chatID int64, req *tg.MessagesSendInlineBotResultRequest) (tg.UpdatesClass, error)
ctx.AnswerCallback(req *tg.MessagesSetBotCallbackAnswerRequest) (bool, error)
```

### Context Bot Commands

```go
ctx.RegisterBotCommands() *adapter.CommandRegistry
ctx.SetBotCommands(group, private []adapter.BotCmd) error
ctx.IsBot() bool
```

### Context Payments

```go
ctx.ExportInvoice(inputMedia tg.InputMediaClass) (*tg.PaymentsExportedInvoice, error)
ctx.SetPreCheckoutResults(success bool, queryID int64, err string) (bool, error)
ctx.TransferStarGift(chatID int64, starGift tg.InputSavedStarGiftClass) (tg.UpdatesClass, error)
```

### Using Context Outside Handlers

```go
ctx := client.CreateContext()

// Send a message outside any handler
ctx.SendMessage(chatID, &tg.MessagesSendMessageRequest{
    Message: "Scheduled notification",
})
```

---

## Keyboard Builder

```go
import "github.com/pageton/gotg"
```

### Inline Keyboard

```go
kb := gotg.Keyboard().
    Button("Approve", "approve_123").Primary().
    Button("Reject", "reject_123").Danger().
    Next().
    URL("Website", "https://example.com").
    Copy("Copy Code", "PROMO123").
    Next().
    Switch("Share", false, "query").
    Build()

// Use with SendOpts
u.Reply("Choose:", &adapter.SendOpts{ReplyMarkup: kb})
```

### Reply Keyboard

```go
kb := gotg.Keyboard().
    Text("Option 1").
    Text("Option 2").
    Next().
    RequestPhone("Share Phone").
    RequestGeo("Share Location").
    BuildReply(gotg.ReplyOptions{
        Resize:      true,
        OneTime:     true,
        Placeholder: "Pick one...",
    })
```

### All Button Methods

```go
k := gotg.Keyboard()

// Inline buttons
k.Button(text, data string)           // Callback button (max 64 bytes data)
k.URL(text, url string)               // Open URL
k.Switch(text string, samePeer bool, query string) // Switch to inline mode
k.Copy(text, copyText string)         // Copy to clipboard
k.Game(text string)                   // HTML5 game
k.Buy(text string)                    // Payment button
k.WebApp(text, url string)            // Telegram Mini App

// Reply keyboard buttons
k.Text(text string)                   // Send text as message
k.RequestPhone(text string)           // Request phone number
k.RequestGeo(text string)             // Request location
k.RequestPoll(text string, quiz bool) // Create poll/quiz

// Style modifiers (apply to last button)
k.Primary()                           // Primary color style
k.Danger()                            // Danger/red color style
k.Success()                           // Success/green color style
k.Icon(emojiID int64)                 // Custom emoji icon

// Layout
k.Next()                              // Move to next row

// Build
k.Build() tg.ReplyMarkupClass         // Build inline keyboard
k.BuildReply(opts ...ReplyOptions) tg.ReplyMarkupClass // Build reply keyboard
```

### ReplyOptions

```go
type ReplyOptions struct {
    Resize      bool   // Fit keyboard to buttons
    OneTime     bool   // Hide after one press
    Selective   bool   // Show only to mentioned users
    Persistent  bool   // Stay visible across messages
    Placeholder string // Input field placeholder
}
```

---

## Conversation System

Multi-step user interactions with state persistence, filters, and timeouts.

```go
import "github.com/pageton/gotg/conv"
```

### Register Steps

```go
convManager := client.ConvManager

convManager.RegisterStep("ask_name", func(state *conv.State) error {
    name := state.Text()
    state.Set("name", name)
    return state.Next("ask_photo", "Send your photo", &conv.NextOpts{
        Filter:  conv.Filters.Photo,
        Timeout: 5 * time.Minute,
    })
})

convManager.RegisterStep("ask_photo", func(state *conv.State) error {
    name := state.GetString("name")
    return state.End("Thanks, " + name + "! Registration complete.")
})
```

### Start Conversation from Handler

```go
dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnCommand("register", func(u *adapter.Update) error {
    _, err := u.StartConv("ask_name", "What's your name?", &adapter.ConvOpts{
        Reply:   true,
        Filter:  conv.Filters.Text,
        Timeout: 2 * time.Minute,
    })
    return err
}))
```

### ConvOpts

```go
type ConvOpts struct {
    Reply       bool              // Reply to user's message
    ReplyMarkup tg.ReplyMarkupClass
    ParseMode   string
    Media       tg.InputMediaClass // Send media with prompt
    Caption     string
    Timeout     time.Duration      // Auto-expire state
    Filter      conv.Filter        // Accept only matching messages
}
```

### State Methods

```go
state.Text() string                    // Current message text
state.Step() string                    // Current step name
state.ChatID() int64
state.UserID() int64
state.Key() conv.Key
state.Message *types.Message           // The message that triggered this step

state.Get(key string) any              // Get stored data
state.GetString(key string) string
state.GetInt(key string) int
state.Set(key string, value any)       // Store data
state.Delete(key string)               // Remove data

state.Next(step, text string, opts ...*conv.NextOpts) error       // Transition to next step
state.NextMedia(step string, media tg.InputMediaClass, caption string, opts ...*conv.NextOpts) error
state.End(text string, opts ...*conv.EndOpts) error               // End conversation
```

### NextOpts / EndOpts

```go
type NextOpts struct {
    Filter  conv.Filter
    Timeout time.Duration
    Reply   bool
}

type EndOpts struct {
    Reply bool
}
```

### Conversation Filters

```go
conv.Filters.Text   // Text only (no media)
conv.Filters.Photo  // Photo
conv.Filters.Video  // Video
conv.Filters.Audio  // Audio
conv.Filters.Voice  // Voice
conv.Filters.Media  // Any media
conv.Filters.Any    // Any message
```

### End/Cancel from Handler

```go
u.EndConv() (cleared bool, existed bool, err error)
u.CancelConv() (cleared bool, existed bool, err error)  // Alias
```

### Start with Data

```go
u.StartConvWithData("step", "text", map[string]any{
    "product_id": 123,
    "price":      9.99,
}, &adapter.ConvOpts{...})
```

### Manager Methods

```go
m := client.ConvManager

m.RegisterStep(name string, handler conv.StepHandler)
m.GetStepHandler(name string) (conv.StepHandler, bool)
m.SetState(key conv.Key, step string, payload []byte, timeout ...time.Duration) error
m.GetState(key conv.Key) (*storage.ConvState, error)
m.LoadState(key conv.Key, msg *types.Message, update any) (*conv.State, error)
m.ClearState(key conv.Key) error
m.GetFilter(key conv.Key) conv.Filter
m.ClearFilter(key conv.Key)
```

### Conversation Middleware (Auto-Routing)

Use `dispatcher.Conv()` middleware to automatically route messages to active
conversation steps. Skips commands (messages starting with `/`). Handles cancel keywords.

```go
dp.AddHandlerToGroup(dispatcher.Conv(dispatcher.ConvOpts{
    Manager:        client.ConvManager,
    CancelKeywords: []string{"cancel", "stop"},
    CancelText:     "Conversation cancelled.",
    CancelReply:    true,                          // Reply to cancel message
    CancelOpts:     &adapter.SendOpts{},           // Optional send opts for cancel text
}), 0) // Group 0 so it runs before other handlers
```

Shorthand (cancel keywords only, no cancel text):

```go
dp.AddHandlerToGroup(dispatcher.ConvMiddleware(client.ConvManager, "cancel", "stop"), 0)
```

---

## Bot Command Registration

```go
err := adapter.NewCommandRegistry(client.API(), ctx).
    AddGroup(
        adapter.BotCmd{Command: "help", Description: "Show help"},
        adapter.BotCmd{Command: "settings", Description: "Bot settings"},
    ).
    AddPrivate(
        adapter.BotCmd{Command: "start", Description: "Start the bot"},
        adapter.BotCmd{Command: "help", Description: "Show help"},
    ).
    WithLangCode("en").
    Register()

// Or from handler context:
u.Ctx.RegisterBotCommands().
    AddPrivate(adapter.BotCmd{Command: "start", Description: "Start"}).
    Register()

// Quick shortcut:
u.Ctx.SetBotCommands(groupCmds, privateCmds)

// Clear all commands:
registry.Clear()
```

---

## Internationalization (i18n)

```go
import "github.com/pageton/gotg/i18n"
import "golang.org/x/text/language"
```

### Creating a Translator

```go
//go:embed locales/*
var localeFS embed.FS

translator := i18n.NewTranslator(&i18n.LocaleConfig{
    DefaultLang: language.English,
    Format:      i18n.FormatYAML,       // or i18n.FormatFTL
    EmbedFS:     localeFS,
    LocaleDir:   "locales",             // Directory inside embed FS
    // SupportedLangs: []language.Tag{},  // Optional: auto-discovered if empty
})
```

Locale file layouts (both supported):

```
Directory-based:  locales/en/*.yaml   locales/es/*.yaml
Flat-file:        locales/en.yaml     locales/es.yaml
```

### Setting Up i18n Middleware

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    DispatcherMiddlewares: []dispatcher.Handler{
        dispatcher.I18nMiddleware(&dispatcher.I18nConfig{
            Translator:         translator,
            DetectFromTelegram: true,  // Auto-detect from user's Telegram lang
        }),
    },
}

// After client init, connect translator to peer storage for persistence:
translator.SetSession(client.PeerStorage)
```

### Using in Handlers

```go
func handler(u *adapter.Update) error {
    // Simple translation with positional args
    text := u.T("welcome", u.FirstName(), "botname")
    // YAML: welcome: "Hello {0}, I am {1}!"

    // Translation with plural/gender context
    text := u.T("items_count", &i18n.Args{Count: 5})
    // YAML variants: one: "{count} item", other: "{count} items"

    // Set user language
    u.SetLang(language.Spanish)

    // Get user language
    lang := u.GetLang() // returns language.Tag

    return nil
}
```

### Translator Methods

```go
t.Get(userID int64, key string, args ...any) string      // Simple translation
t.GetCtx(userID int64, key string, ctx *i18n.Args) string // With context (plural/gender)
t.GetLangCtx(lang language.Tag, key string, args ...any) string // For specific language
t.GetWithLang(langTag string, key string, args ...any) string   // By lang string
t.SetLang(userID int64, lang language.Tag)
t.GetLang(userID int64) language.Tag
t.HasLang(lang language.Tag) bool
t.HasLangSet(userID int64) bool
t.GetSupportedLangs() []language.Tag
t.SetGender(userID int64, gender string)
t.GetGender(userID int64) string
t.DetectLanguage(user *i18n.User) language.Tag
t.InitFromUser(user *tg.User)                             // Auto-set from Telegram user
t.SetSession(peerStorage *storage.PeerStorage)             // For persistent lang prefs
```

### i18n.Args (Plural/Gender Context)

```go
type Args struct {
    Count  int              // For plural selection (CLDR rules)
    Gender string           // For gender variants: "male", "female", "other"
    Args   map[string]any   // Named placeholders: {name} → value
}
```

---

## Outgoing Message Tracking

Track messages sent by your bot (compliance, logging, auditing).

```go
client, _ := gotg.NewClient(apiID, apiHash, gotg.AsBot(token), &gotg.ClientOpts{
    SendOutgoing: true,
})

dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnOutgoing(func(u *adapter.Update) error {
    out := u.EffectiveOutgoing
    switch out.Status {
    case adapter.StatusSucceeded:
        u.Log.Successf("%s succeeded: msg %d in chat %d", out.Action, out.MessageID, out.ChatID)
    case adapter.StatusFailed:
        u.Log.Errorf("%s failed: %v", out.Action, out.Error)
    }
    return nil
}))
```

### FakeOutgoingUpdate

```go
type FakeOutgoingUpdate struct {
    Action    string         // "send", "edit", "delete"
    Status    string         // adapter.StatusSucceeded or adapter.StatusFailed
    IsSend    bool           // true if Action == "send"
    Message   *types.Message // The sent/edited message (nil on delete/failure)
    MessageID int
    ChatID    int64
    Peer      tg.InputPeerClass
    Error     error          // Non-nil when Status == StatusFailed
}

// Status constants
const (
    adapter.StatusSucceeded = "succeeded"
    adapter.StatusFailed    = "failed"
)
```

---

## Logging

```go
import "github.com/pageton/gotg/log"
```

### Log Levels

```go
log.LevelDebug   // Verbose debugging
log.LevelInfo    // General information
log.LevelSuccess // Green checkmark (OK)
log.LevelWarn    // Warnings
log.LevelError   // Errors
log.LevelFatal   // Fatal (calls os.Exit(1))
log.LevelOff     // Disable all output
```

### Configuration

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    LogConfig: &log.Config{
        MinLevel:         log.LevelDebug,
        Debug:            false,           // Convenience alias: sets MinLevel to LevelDebug
        Timestamp:        true,
        Color:            true,            // ANSI colors (auto-disabled in file output)
        Caller:           true,            // Show file:line
        FuncName:         true,            // Show function name
        Module:           "",              // Module tag (e.g. "dispatcher")
        LogFile:          "/var/log/bot.log", // Dual output: console + file
        RotateMaxSize:    10 * 1024 * 1024,  // Rotate at 10MB (0 = no rotation)
        RotateMaxBackups: 3,                 // Keep 3 rotated files
    },
}
```

### Using in Handlers

Three API styles available on `u.Log` (and `client.Logger`):

```go
func handler(u *adapter.Update) error {
    // Structured (key-value pairs)
    u.Log.Debug("debug message", "key", "value")
    u.Log.Info("processing", "user", u.UserID())
    u.Log.Success("completed!")
    u.Log.Warn("warning")
    u.Log.Error("something failed", "err", err)
    u.Log.Fatal("critical failure")  // exits

    // Printf-style
    u.Log.Debugf("user %d sent: %s", u.UserID(), u.Text())
    u.Log.Infof("chat: %d", u.ChatID())
    u.Log.Successf("sent msg %d", msgID)
    u.Log.Warnf("rate limited for %v", duration)
    u.Log.Errorf("failed: %v", err)

    // Println-style (space-separated)
    u.Log.Debugln("processing", "update")
    u.Log.Infoln("done")

    return nil
}
```

### Child Logger with Module Tag

```go
child := client.Logger.WithModule("auth")
child.Info("login attempt", "user", userID)
// Output: [auth] ▸ INFO login attempt user=12345
```

---

## Error Handling

### Custom Error Handler

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    ErrorHandler: func(ctx *adapter.Context, u *adapter.Update, err string) error {
        log.Printf("Error: %s", err)
        return dispatcher.ContinueGroups
    },
}
```

### Custom Panic Handler

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    PanicHandler: func(ctx *adapter.Context, u *adapter.Update, err string) {
        log.Printf("PANIC: %s", err)
    },
}
```

### Sentinel Errors

```go
import "github.com/pageton/gotg/errors"

errors.ErrPeerNotFound
errors.ErrNotChannel
errors.ErrNotChat
errors.ErrNotUser
errors.ErrSessionUnauthorized
errors.ErrClientAlreadyRunning
errors.ErrTextEmpty
```

---

## Helper Functions

```go
import "github.com/pageton/gotg/functions"
```

Utility functions for common operations (used internally, also available directly):

```go
functions.GetMediaFileNameWithID(media tg.MessageMediaClass) (string, error) // "12345-photo.png"
functions.GetMediaFileName(media tg.MessageMediaClass) (string, error)       // "photo.png"
functions.GetInputFileLocation(media tg.MessageMediaClass) (tg.InputFileLocationClass, error)

functions.GetUser(ctx, raw, peerStorage, userID) (*tg.User, error)
functions.GetFullUser(ctx, raw, peerStorage, userID) (*tg.UserFull, error)
functions.GetChat(ctx, raw, peerStorage, chatID) (tg.ChatClass, error)
functions.GetMessages(ctx, raw, peerStorage, chatID, msgIDs) ([]tg.MessageClass, error)
functions.DeleteMessages(ctx, raw, peerStorage, chatID, msgIDs) error

functions.GetUserProfilePhotos(ctx, raw, peerStorage, userID, opts) ([]tg.PhotoClass, error)
functions.TransferStarGift(ctx, raw, peerStorage, chatID, starGift) (tg.UpdatesClass, error)

functions.GetInputPeerClassFromID(peerStorage, id) tg.InputPeerClass
functions.ResolveInputPeerByID(ctx, raw, peerStorage, id) (tg.InputPeerClass, error)
functions.EncodeSessionToString(session) (string, error)
functions.DecodeStringToSession(str) (*SessionData, error)
```

---

## Raw API Access

For any functionality not wrapped by GoTG, use the raw gotd/td client:

```go
// From handler
raw := u.Ctx.Raw

history, err := raw.MessagesGetHistory(u.Ctx, &tg.MessagesGetHistoryRequest{
    Peer:  u.Ctx.PeerStorage.GetInputPeerByID(chatID),
    Limit: 10,
})

// Access entities
users := u.Entities.Users    // map[int64]*tg.User
chats := u.Entities.Chats    // map[int64]*tg.Chat
channels := u.Entities.Channels // map[int64]*tg.Channel
```

---

## Middleware

### Dispatcher Middleware

Handlers added to lower group numbers run first:

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    DispatcherMiddlewares: []dispatcher.Handler{
        loggingMiddleware,  // group 0
        authMiddleware,     // group 1
    },
}

// Or manually:
dp.AddHandlerToGroup(handler, -1) // Runs before all others
```

### Run Middleware (gotd/td level)

Used for gotd/td-level concerns like flood wait handling:

```go
import (
    "github.com/gotd/contrib/middleware/floodwait"
    "github.com/gotd/contrib/middleware/ratelimit"
    "golang.org/x/time/rate"
)

waiter := floodwait.NewSimpleWaiter().WithMaxRetries(3)
rateLimiter := ratelimit.New(rate.Every(100*time.Millisecond), 5)

&gotg.ClientOpts{
    Middlewares: []telegram.Middleware{waiter, rateLimiter},
    RunMiddleware: func(
        origRun func(ctx context.Context, f func(ctx context.Context) error) error,
        ctx context.Context,
        f func(ctx context.Context) error,
    ) error {
        return waiter.Run(ctx, func(ctx context.Context) error {
            return origRun(ctx, f)
        })
    },
}
```

### I18n Middleware

```go
&gotg.ClientOpts{
    DispatcherMiddlewares: []dispatcher.Handler{
        dispatcher.I18nMiddleware(&dispatcher.I18nConfig{
            Translator:         translator,
            DetectFromTelegram: true,
        }),
    },
}
```

---

## Parse Modes

```go
// Constants
adapter.HTML       = "HTML"
adapter.Markdown   = "Markdown"
adapter.MarkdownV2 = "MarkdownV2"
adapter.ModeNone   = ""
```

Set globally via `ClientOpts.ParseMode` or per-method via `SendOpts.ParseMode`.

---

## Complete Bot Example

```go
package main

import (
    "fmt"
    "log"
    "time"

    "github.com/pageton/gotg"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/adapter"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/conv"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/dispatcher"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/dispatcher/handlers"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/dispatcher/handlers/filters"
    gotglog "github.com/pageton/gotg/log"
    "github.com/pageton/gotg/session"
    "gorm.io/driver/sqlite"
)

func main() {
    client, err := gotg.NewClient(123456, "api_hash", gotg.AsBot("token"), &gotg.ClientOpts{
        Session:      session.SqlSession(sqlite.Open("mybot")),
        ParseMode:    "HTML",
        SendOutgoing: true,
        LogConfig: &gotglog.Config{
            MinLevel:  gotglog.LevelInfo,
            Timestamp: true,
            Color:     true,
        },
    })
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatal(err)
    }

    dp := client.Dispatcher

    // Conversation middleware (auto-routes messages to active convos, handles cancel)
    dp.AddHandlerToGroup(dispatcher.Conv(dispatcher.ConvOpts{
        Manager:        client.ConvManager,
        CancelKeywords: []string{"cancel", "stop"},
        CancelText:     "Conversation cancelled.",
        CancelReply:    true,
    }), 0)

    // /start command (private only)
    dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnCommand("start", func(u *adapter.Update) error {
        kb := gotg.Keyboard().
            Button("Register", "action_register").
            URL("Docs", "https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/pageton/gotg").
            Build()
        _, err := u.Reply(fmt.Sprintf("Welcome %s!", u.Mention()), &adapter.SendOpts{
            ReplyMarkup: kb,
        })
        return err
    }, filters.Private))

    // Callback query handler
    dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnCallbackQuery(filters.CallbackQuery.Prefix("action_"), func(u *adapter.Update) error {
        u.Answer("Starting...")
        u.Edit("Registration started. What's your name?")
        _, err := u.StartConv("reg:name", "What's your name?", &adapter.ConvOpts{
            Reply:  true,
            Filter: conv.Filters.Text,
        })
        return err
    }))

    // Photo handler with download
    dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnMessage(func(u *adapter.Update) error {
        msg := u.EffectiveMessage
        path, _, err := msg.Download("downloads")
        if err != nil {
            return err
        }
        _, err = u.Reply(fmt.Sprintf("Downloaded to: %s", path))
        return err
    }, filters.Message.Photo))

    // Outgoing tracking
    dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnOutgoing(func(u *adapter.Update) error {
        out := u.EffectiveOutgoing
        if out.Status == adapter.StatusSucceeded {
            u.Log.Successf("Sent msg %d to chat %d", out.MessageID, out.ChatID)
        }
        return nil
    }))

    // Conversation: registration
    cm := client.ConvManager
    cm.RegisterStep("reg:name", func(s *conv.State) error {
        s.Set("name", s.Text())
        return s.Next("reg:age", "How old are you?", &conv.NextOpts{
            Filter:  conv.Filters.Text,
            Timeout: 2 * time.Minute,
        })
    })
    cm.RegisterStep("reg:age", func(s *conv.State) error {
        name := s.GetString("name")
        return s.End("Thanks, " + name + "! You're " + s.Text() + " years old.")
    })

    // Echo fallback (lowest priority)
    dp.AddHandler(handlers.OnMessage(func(u *adapter.Update) error {
        _, err := u.Reply(u.Text())
        return err
    }, filters.Message.Text))

    fmt.Printf("Bot (@%s) started!\n", client.Self.Username)
    client.Idle()
}
```
